nasb.text: O Lord, the hope of Israel, All who forsake You will be put to shame. Those who turn away on earth will be written down, Because they have forsaken the fountain of living water, even the Lord.

esv.text: O Lord, the hope of Israel, all who forsake you shall be put to shame; those who turn away from you  shall be written in the earth, for they have forsaken the Lord, the fountain of living water.

cnv.text: 耶和華以色列的盼望啊！ 離棄你的，都必蒙羞； 偏離你的，他們的名字必寫在沙土上， 因為他們離棄了耶和華這活水的源頭。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你是以色列的盼望。 背弃你的人必蒙羞， 背叛你的人必像写在尘土上的名字一样消逝， 因为他们背弃了耶和华——活水的源泉。
